title: Inkstone News
subtitle: Improving editorial storytelling for mobile-first readers
problem_statement: The legacy reading experience prioritized dense layouts over scannability, creating friction for users who mainly consumed stories on mobile.
The product needed clearer hierarchy for breaking news, richer article modules for explainers, and faster editorial publishing workflows.

transformations.title: Reading Flow Redesign
content: Introduced a modular article structure with clearer visual hierarchy and section breaks to improve readability.
Reworked typography rhythm and spacing rules so long-form content remained comfortable across devices.

transformations.title: Editorial Component System
content: Defined reusable components for pull quotes, timelines, key facts, and inline related stories.
This reduced one-off design effort and helped editorial teams publish richer story formats consistently.
